Industrial AI & Reliability

Bridging the gap between AI and industry

Ankit Chawla helps manufacturing organizations harness Artificial Intelligence, Reliability Engineering, and Digital Transformation through practical, on-the-floor innovation.

Explore the work ↓
SEC. 01 — TRAINING

Industrial AI Training

Hands-on workshops that take plant and reliability teams from AI-curious to AI-capable.

RCAI Framework
